---
title: "Dr David Minchella"
image: "../images/davidm.jpeg"
role: alumni
programme: [gambling]
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
listing:
   - id: badges
     contents: "../badges_awarded/david/*.jpg"
     template: ../badges.ejs
---

Dr David Minchella is a Specialist Clinical Psychologist at Durham, Tees Valley and Forensic Care Group.

He completed his doctoral thesis in the lab (2026), looking at the cognitive and neural mechanisms underlying risk-taking behavior in hypomania. His project focuses on the potential moderating roles of reward focus and risk perception. He used functional near infrared spectroscopy to look at neural activation. 

## Research Training

::: {#badges}

:::
